raw_ticket:
This is the THIRD time I'm writing about my missing package. Order #9087 was supposed to arrive last Tuesday. Nobody replies. I've already reached out on Twitter. If I don't get an answer today I'm disputing the charge with my bank AND filing a complaint with the consumer protection agency. This is ridiculous.

— Jennifer
ticket_summary: 3rd contact attempt, missing package #9087, customer threatening chargeback + regulatory complaint + social media escalation
brand_voice: Warm, direct, customer-first. English-UK. Take ownership of errors. Offer concrete remediation.
